titleStmt.title: SII 9.578: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao

No. 578. (A.R. No. 381 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF THE EAST VERANDAH IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is very much damaged and dated Śaka 1458, Durmukhi, Māgha, ba. 14, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1536 February 8, Thursday, in the reign of Achyuta- dēvarāya-Mahārāya who was ruling at Vijayanagara. It records a gift of land and gold made by Koṇḍappa-Voḍeya for the service of the god Kōṭināthadēva and the goddess Saṅkamādēvī. The king is stated to have appointed Suṅkaṇa-Nāyaka as the governor of Bārakūra-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti . śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ nirvighnamastu
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra kyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhu
dayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1457 saṁdu
yeṁṭaneya vartamāna durmukhisaṁvatsa
rada māgha ba 14 gu lu śrima(ṁ)nmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvī
raAcyutadēvarāyamahārāyaru sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ vijayanagariya siṁhvāsanadalu ci
ttayisi samastaduṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipālanavāgi
sakala va(ṁ)rnnadha(ṁ)rmmāśramavanu pratipālisuva kālada
li Ā rāyaru bārakūrarājyavanu suṁkaṇanāyka
rige pālisi Ā suṁkaṇanāyakara nirūpadiṁda bārakū
ra rājyavanu dēvavoḍeyaru
huṇuve puṇyakāladalū dēvavoḍeyaru
yamiru
2 Urattigū
kōṭināthadēvarige
saṁkamādēviya pūjege sidhā
ya ge varāha ga 22 Ø 2 .
bra(ṁ)hmādāya varahaga 12 Ubhayaṁ va
nū koṁḍappavoḍeyaru śrīkōṭi
nāthadēvarige gaḍiya kramaveṁteṁdare naṁ
ma Aramanege saluva bhaṁḍārastaḷada kōṭīśvara
da grāmadavoḷagaṇa Aṁgaḍi
yaru koṭaṁthā varaha
134 ¥ 20 Akṣaradalū nūramūvattanālku
varaha Ippatu haṇa bēḍike sahavā
gi tāgi sarvamānyavāgi
śrīkōṭināthadēvarige ko
ṭa dharma
dhāreyanu Eṟadu koṭa
mānya kālaṁprati naḍesikoṁḍu
Uṁ śrikōṭināthadē
vara pūjeya
to 39 damaged
koṁḍapa vo
ḍeyaru koṭa ga kuḍukūraṁgaḍi
ya nanu prati
yakṣīṇi Āgāmi
siddha sādhyagaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmya saha
ke saha sarvamāśyavāgi śrīkōṭinā
thadēvarige dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṁḍapavoḍe
yaru koṭa paṭṭi . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānā
śrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti pāla
nādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattādviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḥpha
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁThe slab is broken after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.578 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
